mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_GROUP_NO, ROLE_NO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY FROM sy_role_group_relation WHERE ROLE_GROUP_NO = #{roleGroupNo} ORDER BY ORDERNO
SELECT ROLE_GROUP_NO, ROLE_NO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY FROM sy_role_group_relation WHERE ROLE_NO = #{roleNo} ORDER BY ORDERNO
SELECT ROLE_GROUP_NO, ROLE_NO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY FROM sy_role_group_relation WHERE ROLE_GROUP_NO = #{roleGroupNo} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO
